Use of an uncertainty of 0.05 пҒ— in value of R or R Use of U = 2пӮҙ (U in R + U in R ) shown Or Use of maximum and minimum values shown %U = 1.8 (%) Example of calculation U = 2 пӮҙ (0.05 + 0.05) = 2пӮҙ 0.1 = 0.2 %U = (0.2 / 11.4) пӮҙ 100 = 1.8 % (1) (1) (1)

Upper limit of пҒІ = 5.0 (пӮҙ 10 вҲ’7 пҒ— m) Lower limit of R L = 11.2 (пҒ—) Conclusion based on comparison of limits [MP3 dependent MP1 or MP2] Example of calculation Upper limit пҒІ = 4.6 пӮҙ 10 вҲ’7 пӮҙ (1 + 0.09) = 5.0 пӮҙ 10 вҲ’7 пҒ— m Lower limit R L = 11.4 пӮҙ (1вҲ’0.02) = 11.2 пҒ— Therefore both values fall in the range (confirming metal is constantan). Or %D for пҒІ = 6.1% %D for R L = 1.8% Conclusion based on comparison of %D and %U [MP3 dependent MP1 or MP2] Example of calculation %D for пҒІ = (4.9 вҲ’ 4.6) / 4.9 пӮҙ 100 = 6.1 % %D for R L = (11.4 вҲ’ 11.2) / 11.2 пӮҙ 100 = 1.8 % Therefore both %D are less than %U (confirming metal is constantan).
